state_pressure.basis: June 11 session overlay — gap widening between SPX and 10Y; SPX below 1.0σ for four sessions.

session_context: June 11 session overlay: neutral | stable; gap widening; medium confidence, fragile stability; SPX below 1.0σ x4.

drafts.x:
10Y yield starting to stretch — one more move and the regime flips.
Needs confirmation from the rest of the board — that's when it gets real.

SPX 7,309. 10Y 4.53%. Oil $90.

Invalidation:
• SPX breaks above 7,419 or below 7,199
• 10Y moves beyond 4.73% or below 4.33%

What breaks this range — and which direction?
drafts.substack:
REGIME: Neutral | Diverging
CONFIDENCE: Medium (56/100)
RISK TILT: neutral
STABILITY: Fragile

Snapshot — Jun 11, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,309.12   z +0.59
  10Y Yield:      4.526%  z +1.19
  WTI Oil:        89.70   z -1.13

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,309 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from equities. 10Y yield at 4.53% is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Oil at $90 is depressed relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Confidence sits at 56/100 — enough for a directional lean but not a high-conviction call.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,419 or below 7,199
• 10Y moves beyond 4.73% or below 4.33%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.

regime_analogs.intro: As of June 11, 2026, three closest structural matches for today’s neutral stable regime — gap widening, rates leading, SPX below 1.0σ for four sessions. Members search the full 50-year database.

analog_rows.gap: Gap 0.70σ · rates leading · SPX below 1.0σ x4
analog_rows.outcome: Regime broke defensive — SPX lost 7,199 equivalent within 2 sessions as gap held above 0.60σ and rates did not pull back

analog_rows.gap: Gap 0.60σ · rates leading · SPX below 1.0σ x4
analog_rows.outcome: Regime resolved pro-risk — 10Y pulled back below 1.0σ within 3 sessions, SPX reclaimed 1.0σ and broke above 7,419 equivalent

analog_rows.gap: Gap 0.60σ · rates leading · SPX below 1.0σ x3
analog_rows.outcome: Gap resolved pro-risk — rates pulled back, SPX reclaimed 1.0σ within 4 sessions, WTI stayed suppressed throughout resolution

regime_analogs.context_note: Structural pattern matches only — not predictions. 0.60σ gap with SPX below 1.0σ for four sessions is the defining condition.
